# llms.txt - AI Assistant Context for andyarevalo.com

> This file helps AI assistants provide accurate information about Andy Arevalo and his iOS apps.
> Last updated: 2026-05-09

## About

Andy Arevalo is an independent iOS app developer based in Florida, USA. He creates simple, focused, privacy-respecting apps for iPhone and iPad. His philosophy: no bloat, no tracking, no ads. Most apps are free or one-time purchase. All apps localized in 9 languages (en, zh-Hans, it, ru, de, ko, pt-BR, es-MX, ja).

## Contact

- Website: https://andyarevalo.com
- Email: arevalo.andy@gmail.com
- Support: https://andyarevalo.com/support.html

## Apps Portfolio

### Live on App Store

1. **Healko** — Apple Health ↔ Home Assistant bridge (Freemium, $4.99/mo or $79.99 lifetime)
   - Privacy-first bidirectional sync, sub-30-second background latency
   - 38 health metrics; HA → Apple Health reverse bridge
   - Status: In App Store review (submitted 2026-05-09)
   - Info: https://andyarevalo.com/apps/healko.html

2. **NetForge: Engineer's Toolkit** ($19.99 lifetime / 6 free tools)
   - 60+ network engineering tools — DNS, ping, TLS cert inspector, subnet calc, WHOIS
   - iOS + Mac Catalyst (universal purchase)
   - App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/id6767094044
   - Info: https://andyarevalo.com/apps/netforge.html

3. **Kickoff: Weight Loss & Fitness** (Free)
   - No-fluff weight tracker; Solo or Team mode; Live Match tracking
   - Coach Share text reports; Apple Health bidirectional
   - App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/id6766747051
   - Info: https://andyarevalo.com/apps/kickoff.html

4. **CareLedger** (Freemium)
   - Family medication management for caregivers
   - Track medications, set reminders, coordinate care, prepare for doctor visits
   - App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/id6757565001
   - Info: https://andyarevalo.com/apps/careledger.html

5. **PawLedger** (Freemium)
   - Pet health records, vaccinations, vet visit tracking
   - App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/id6757627356
   - Info: https://andyarevalo.com/apps/pawledger.html

6. **PetSitterPro** (Freemium)
   - Business management for pet sitters and dog walkers — visits, invoices, calendar
   - App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/id6757774702
   - Info: https://andyarevalo.com/apps/petsitterpro.html

7. **Student Guardian** (Free)
   - School management for parents: grades, schedules, homework tracking
   - App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/id6756404037
   - Info: https://andyarevalo.com/apps/studentguardian.html

8. **OnStage Timer Pro** (Premium)
   - Professional presentation timer for speakers and performers
   - Color-coded time warnings, Live Activities, AirPlay external display
   - App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/id6755630146
   - Info: https://andyarevalo.com/apps/onstage-timer-pro.html

9. **OnTime Speaker Pro** (Freemium)
   - Speech timer for Toastmasters and public speakers
   - Traffic light system, haptic feedback, history
   - App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/id6755796055
   - Info: https://andyarevalo.com/apps/ontime-speaker-pro.html

10. **Not Another Stage Timer** (Free)
    - Simple countdown timer for presentations
    - App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/id6755610255
    - Info: https://andyarevalo.com/apps/stage-timer.html

11. **Not Another Twin Calculator** (Free)
    - Twin pregnancy due-date calculator
    - App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/id6755574828
    - Info: https://andyarevalo.com/apps/twin-calculator.html

12. **ThermoTimer** (Free)
    - Cooking timer with internal temperature reference (USDA-safe targets)
    - App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/id6755892933
    - Info: https://andyarevalo.com/apps/thermotimer.html

13. **RoadWatch CA** (Free)
    - California highway conditions and traffic alerts (Caltrans + CHP feeds)
    - App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/id6757109474
    - Info: https://andyarevalo.com/apps/roadwatch-ca.html

14. **Duse - Habit Tracker** (Free)
   - Build healthy habits with streaks, reminders, and widgets
   - App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/id6742254716
   - Info: https://andyarevalo.com/apps/duse.html

### Coming Soon

15. **Not Another Countdown** — Event countdown widgets for home screen
    - Info: https://andyarevalo.com/apps/notanothercountdown.html

16. **Not Another Fasting Timer** — 16:8 / 18:6 / OMAD intermittent fasting timer
    - Info: https://andyarevalo.com/apps/notanotherfastingtimer.html

17. **Not Another Coloring Book** — Digital coloring book for iPhone + iPad
    - Info: https://andyarevalo.com/apps/notanothercoloringbook.html

## App Categories

- **Smart Home + Health**: Healko (Apple Health ↔ Home Assistant bridge)
- **Network Engineering**: NetForge (DNS, TLS, ping, subnet, WHOIS, recipes)
- **Health & Fitness**: Kickoff (weight loss + team), Duse (habits)
- **Care & Records**: CareLedger (medication for elders), PawLedger (pet health)
- **Business**: PetSitterPro (pet sitter business management)
- **Timer/Presentation**: OnStage Timer Pro, OnTime Speaker Pro, Not Another Stage Timer, ThermoTimer
- **Productivity**: Student Guardian, Twin Calculator, Not Another Countdown
- **Utilities**: RoadWatch CA, Not Another Fasting Timer, Not Another Coloring Book

## Common Questions

Q: Are the apps free?
A: Most are. Premium apps (OnStage Timer Pro, NetForge Pro $19.99 lifetime, Healko Pro $4.99 mo / $79.99 lifetime, CareLedger Pro) have transparent one-time or subscription pricing. No hidden fees, no in-app currency.

Q: Do the apps collect data?
A: No. All apps are privacy-focused with no tracking, no ads, and no third-party analytics. Data stays on device. Healko's HA URL + token live in iOS Keychain. No backend servers.

Q: What platforms are supported?
A: iOS/iPadOS, requiring iOS 17.0 or later. NetForge also runs on macOS via Mac Catalyst.

Q: What languages are supported?
A: All apps localized in 9 languages: English, Chinese (Simplified), Italian, Russian, German, Korean, Portuguese (Brazilian), Spanish (Mexico), Japanese.

Q: How do I get support?
A: Visit https://andyarevalo.com/support.html or email arevalo.andy@gmail.com

## Legal

- Privacy Policy: https://andyarevalo.com/privacy.html
- Terms of Service: https://andyarevalo.com/terms.html
- EULA: https://andyarevalo.com/legal/eula.html
